name: TTS Plugin
description: Local TTS plugin for Fast Qwen and Piper with browser fallback.

pythonCommand.label: Python command
pythonCommand.description: Interpreter used to run the bundled backend

backendAutoStart.label: Auto start backend
backendAutoStart.description: Start the embedded backend in the background when the plugin is enabled

qwenModelsRoot.label: Qwen models root
qwenModelsRoot.description: Optional local root folder containing Qwen model directories

modelPathsJson.label: Model path overrides
modelPathsJson.description: Optional JSON map of model id to existing local folder

piperSourceDir.label: Piper source folder
piperSourceDir.description: Optional folder used to copy local Piper assets into the plugin runtime
